text.title: strategy-analysis-change-strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for strategy-analysis-change-strategy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Change strategy with a single option presented as the recommendation, with a section titled "Alternatives Considered" that lists two options with one-sentence dismissals.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: One-sentence dismissals signal the alternatives were not seriously evaluated. Each option must be profiled against all criteria; the matrix does not lie.
